entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Vigna unguiculata) used in intercropping systems

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops together, specifically cereal-legume

entities.name: SOLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing a single crop species alone

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: A crop simulation model used to evaluate crop dynamics and yields

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production per unit area

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass produced by the crops

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the leaf area per unit ground surface area

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the crops

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A condition of prolonged water shortage affecting plant growth

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources for crop needs

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT STRESS
entities.description: The physiological stress caused by insufficient water availability

entities.name: LOW PLANTING DENSITY
entities.description: A lower number of plants per unit area

entities.name: HIGH PLANTING DENSITY
entities.description: A higher number of plants per unit area

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An environment characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The site of the field experiment in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGY
entities.description: A method used to mitigate the effects of environmental stress like drought

entities.name: FOOD PRODUCTION DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The integration of various crops to diversify food sources
